name: research-toolkit
description: Research & investigation skills for thinking-with-AI — investigation protocols (deep-investigation, cui-bono / "follow the money", screening a dev job or employer for hidden military/defense ties), text & source deconstruction, frame rotation, and iterative verification that escalates to a recursive adversarial dialectic (generate a claim's exact opposite and test it). The skepticism is symmetric — turned on the consensus, the contrarian take, the model's own bias, and its own conclusions; it assumes no villain in advance (POSIWID: judge a method by what it does, not what it claims). Includes a transparency MCP.
